---
title: "Publications"
---

## Peer-Reviewed Articles

1. Agung Budiyono, Michael Moody, Hadyan L. Prihadi, Rafika Rahmawati, and Sebastian Deffner.
"[Quantum speed limit for observables from quantum asymmetry](https://journals.aps.org/pra/abstract/10.1103/tfnt-58sw)"
*Physical Review A* **113**, 042450 (2026).
\[[arXiv:2511.16526](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.16526)\]

## Preprints

No preprints at this time.

## Manuscripts in Preparation

1. Michael J. Moody and Sebastian Deffner.
"Observable quantum speed limits for Markovian open quantum systems."
